---
title: 'Vaccine Information Statements (VISs) via CDC Website'
date: '2020-06-10T18:42:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'To Vacs or not to Vacs, that is the question.'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7024981312343127763'
blogger_filename: '/2020/06/vaccine-information-statements-viss-via.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/To Vacs or not to Vacs, that is the question./feed.atom'
---

<div><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/current-vis.html" target="_blank">Current VISs</a></div><div><br /></div><div><h4 style="box-sizing: border-box; font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;, apple-system, blinkmacsystemfont, &quot;Segoe UI&quot;, &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 1.375rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-top: 0px;">Multi</h4><ul style="box-sizing: border-box; font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;, apple-system, blinkmacsystemfont, &quot;Segoe UI&quot;, &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; margin-bottom: 1rem; margin-top: 0px; padding-left: 25px;"><li style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-bottom: 0.4rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/multi.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Multiple Vaccines (DTaP, Hib, Hepatitis B, Polio, and PCV13)&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem; text-decoration-line: none !important;">(4/1/20)</span></a>&nbsp;<em style="box-sizing: border-box;">interim</em><br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /><span class="fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0.875rem;">This VIS may be used in place of the individual VISs for DTaP, Hib, Hepatitis B, Polio, and PCV13 when two or more of these vaccines are administered during the same visit. It may be used for infants through children receiving their routine 4-6 year vaccines.</span></li></ul></div><div><h4 style="box-sizing: border-box; font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;, apple-system, blinkmacsystemfont, &quot;Segoe UI&quot;, &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 1.375rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-top: 0px;">Routine</h4><ul class="mb-0 cc-md-2 lsp-out bullet-list" style="box-sizing: border-box; column-count: 2; font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;, apple-system, blinkmacsystemfont, &quot;Segoe UI&quot;, &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; list-style-position: outside; margin-bottom: 0px !important; margin-top: 0px; padding-left: 0px;"><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/dtap.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">DTaP (Diphtheria, Tetanus, Pertussis)</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(4/1/20)</span>&nbsp;<em style="box-sizing: border-box;">interim</em></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/hep-a.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Hepatitis A</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(7/20/16)</span></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/hep-b.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Hepatitis B</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(8/15/19)</span>&nbsp;<em style="box-sizing: border-box;">interim</em></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/hib.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Hib (<em style="box-sizing: border-box;">Haemophilus Influenzae</em>&nbsp;type b)</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(10/30/19)</span>&nbsp;<em style="box-sizing: border-box;">interim</em></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/hpv.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">HPV (Human Papillomavirus)</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(10/30/19)</span>&nbsp;<em style="box-sizing: border-box;">interim</em></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/flulive.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Influenza – Live, Intranasal</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(8/15/19)</span>&nbsp;<em style="box-sizing: border-box;">interim</em></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/flu.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Influenza – Inactivated</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(8/15/19)</span>&nbsp;<em style="box-sizing: border-box;">interim</em></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/mmr.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Measles/Mumps/Rubella (MMR)</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(8/15/19)</span>&nbsp;<em style="box-sizing: border-box;">interim</em></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/mmrv.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Measles/Mumps/Rubella &amp; Varicella (MMRV)</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(8/15/19)</span><em style="box-sizing: border-box;">interim</em></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/mening.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Meningococcal ACWY</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(8/15/19)</span>&nbsp;<em style="box-sizing: border-box;">interim</em></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/mening-serogroup.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Meningococcal B</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(8/15/19)</span>&nbsp;<em style="box-sizing: border-box;">interim</em></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/pcv13.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Pneumococcal Conjugate (PCV13)</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(10/30/19)</span>&nbsp;<em style="box-sizing: border-box;">interim</em></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/ppv.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Pneumococcal Polysaccharide (PPSV23)</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(10/30/19)</span></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/ipv.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Polio</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(10/30/19)</span>&nbsp;<em style="box-sizing: border-box;">interim</em></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/rotavirus.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Rotavirus</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(10/30/19)</span>&nbsp;<em style="box-sizing: border-box;">interim</em></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/tdap.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Tdap (Tetanus, Diphtheria, Pertussis)</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(4/1/20)</span>&nbsp;<em style="box-sizing: border-box;">interim</em></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/td.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Td (Tetanus, Diphtheria)</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(4/1/20)</span>&nbsp;<em style="box-sizing: border-box;">interim</em></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/varicella.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Varicella (Chickenpox)</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(8/15/19)</span>&nbsp;<em style="box-sizing: border-box;">interim</em></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/shingles.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Zoster / Shingles (Live)</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(10/30/19)</span></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/shingles-recombinant.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Zoster / Shingles (Recombinant)</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(10/30/19)</span></li></ul><p style="box-sizing: border-box; font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;, apple-system, blinkmacsystemfont, &quot;Segoe UI&quot;, &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; margin-bottom: 1rem; margin-top: 0px;">&nbsp;</p><hr style="border-bottom: 0px; border-image: initial; border-left: 0px; border-right: 0px; border-top-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); border-top-style: solid; box-sizing: content-box; font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;, apple-system, blinkmacsystemfont, &quot;Segoe UI&quot;, &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; height: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; margin-top: 1rem; overflow: visible;" /><h4 style="box-sizing: border-box; font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;, apple-system, blinkmacsystemfont, &quot;Segoe UI&quot;, &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 1.375rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-top: 0px;">Non-routine</h4><ul class="mb-0 cc-md-2 lsp-out bullet-list" style="box-sizing: border-box; column-count: 2; font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;, apple-system, blinkmacsystemfont, &quot;Segoe UI&quot;, &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; list-style-position: outside; margin-bottom: 0px !important; margin-top: 0px; padding-left: 0px;"><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/adenovirus.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Adenovirus</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(1/8/20)</span><br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /><span class="text-gray-d2 fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">Note: Adenovirus vaccine is approved for use only among military personnel.</span></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/anthrax.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Anthrax</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(1/8/20)</span></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/cholera.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Cholera</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(10/30/19)</span></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/je-ixiaro.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Japanese Encephalitis</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(8/15/19)</span></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/rabies.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Rabies</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(1/8/20)</span></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;">Smallpox (Vaccinia)&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(12/1/15)</span><br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /><a class="tp-link-policy" data-domain-ext="gov" href="http://www.fda.gov/downloads/BiologicsBloodVaccines/Vaccines/ApprovedProducts/UCM142576.pdf" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;" target="new">Medical Guide for vaccination with ACAM2000&nbsp;<span class="sr-only" style="border: 0px; box-sizing: border-box; clip: rect(0px, 0px, 0px, 0px); height: 1px; margin: -1px; overflow: hidden; padding: 0px; position: absolute; text-decoration-line: none !important; white-space: nowrap; width: 1px;">pdf icon</span><span aria-hidden="true" class="fi cdc-icon-pdf x16 fill-pdf" style="box-sizing: border-box; display: inline-block; fill: rgb(193, 39, 45) !important; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; min-width: 1.25em; position: relative; text-align: center; text-decoration: inherit; vertical-align: inherit;"></span><span class="file-details" style="box-sizing: border-box; display: inline-block; font-size: 1rem !important; text-decoration-line: none;">[6 pages]</span><span class="sr-only" style="border: 0px; box-sizing: border-box; clip: rect(0px, 0px, 0px, 0px); height: 1px; margin: -1px; overflow: hidden; padding: 0px; position: absolute; text-decoration-line: none !important; white-space: nowrap; width: 1px;">external icon</span><span aria-hidden="true" class="fi cdc-icon-external x16 fill-external" style="box-sizing: border-box; display: inline-block; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; min-width: 1.25em; position: relative; text-align: center; text-decoration: inherit; vertical-align: inherit;"></span></a>&nbsp;<span class="text-gray-d2 fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">This medication guide replaces the Smallpox VIS. It is to be used before one receives the vaccination. This guide is not available in other languages.</span></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/typhoid.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Typhoid</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(10/30/19)</span></li><li style="box-sizing: border-box; break-inside: avoid-column; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-left: 1.5rem;"><a href="https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/hcp/vis/vis-statements/yf.html" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #075290;">Yellow Fever</a>&nbsp;<span class="text-red fs0875" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: rgb(143, 0, 0) !important; font-size: 0.875rem;">(4/1/20)</span></li></ul></div>
